    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    CloudEurekaClient
    Subclass of DiscoveryClient that sends a HeartbeatEvent when CloudEurekaClient.onCacheRefreshed() is called.
    CloudEurekaInstanceConfig
     
    CloudEurekaTransportConfig
     
    CloudJacksonJson
     
    DefaultEurekaClientHttpRequestFactorySupplier
    Supplier for the ClientHttpRequestFactory to be used by Eureka client that uses HttpClients.
    DefaultManagementMetadataProvider
    Default implementation of DefaultManagementMetadataProvider.
    DiscoveryClientOptionalArgsConfiguration
     
    DiscoveryClientOptionalArgsConfiguration.RestClientConfiguration
     
    DiscoveryClientOptionalArgsConfiguration.WebClientConfiguration
     
    DiscoveryClientOptionalArgsConfiguration.WebClientNotFoundConfiguration
     
    EnableEurekaServer
    Annotation to activate Eureka Server related configuration.
    EurekaApplications
    A simple wrapper class for Applications that insure proper Jackson serialization through the JsonProperties overwrites.
    EurekaAutoServiceRegistration
    Provides an implementation of AutoServiceRegistration for registering service instances in Eureka.
    EurekaClientAutoConfiguration
     
    EurekaClientAutoConfiguration.EurekaClientConfiguration
     
    EurekaClientAutoConfiguration.EurekaHealthIndicatorConfiguration
     
    EurekaClientAutoConfiguration.RefreshableEurekaClientConfiguration
     
    EurekaClientConfigBean
    Eureka client configuration bean.
    EurekaClientConfigServerAutoConfiguration
    Extra configuration for config server if it happens to be a Eureka instance.
    EurekaClientHttpRequestFactorySupplier
    Supplier for the ClientHttpRequestFactory to be used by Eureka client.
    EurekaClientHttpRequestFactorySupplier.RequestConfigCustomizer
    Allows customising the RequestConfig of the underlying Apache HC5 instance.
    EurekaConfigServerBootstrapConfiguration
    Bootstrap configuration for config client that wants to look the config server up via discovery.
    EurekaConfigServerBootstrapConfiguration.WebClientConfiguration
     
    EurekaConfigServerBootstrapper
     
    EurekaConfigServerInstanceProvider
     
    EurekaConstants
    Class containing Eureka-specific constants.
    EurekaController
     
    EurekaDashboardProperties
    Configuration properties for the Eureka dashboard (UI).
    EurekaDiscoveryClient
    A DiscoveryClient implementation for Eureka.
    EurekaDiscoveryClientConfiguration
     
    EurekaDiscoveryClientConfiguration.EurekaClientConfigurationRefresher
     
    EurekaDiscoveryClientConfiguration.EurekaHealthCheckHandlerConfiguration
     
    EurekaHealthCheckHandler
    A Eureka health checker, maps the application status into InstanceInfo.InstanceStatus that will be propagated to Eureka registry.
    EurekaHealthIndicator
     
    EurekaInstanceCanceledEvent
     
    EurekaInstanceConfigBean
     
    EurekaInstanceMonitor
    SmartApplicationListener for collecting event metrics from PeerAwareInstanceRegistry.
    EurekaInstanceRegisteredEvent
     
    EurekaInstanceRenewedEvent
     
    EurekaInstanceTagsProvider
    Provides Tags for Eureka instance metrics.
    EurekaLoadBalancerClientConfiguration
    A configuration for Spring Cloud LoadBalancer that retrieves client instance zone from Eureka and sets it as a property.
    EurekaLoadBalancerProperties
    A ConfigurationProperties bean for the Eureka-specific instrumentation of Spring Cloud LoadBalancer.
    EurekaProperties
    Configuration properties for the Eureka deployment.
    EurekaReactiveDiscoveryClient
    A ReactiveDiscoveryClient implementation for Eureka.
    EurekaReactiveDiscoveryClientConfiguration
    Configuration related to service discovery when using Netflix Eureka.
    EurekaRegistration
    Eureka-specific implementation of service instance Registration.
    EurekaRegistration.Builder
    A builder for EurekaRegistration objects.
    EurekaRegistryAvailableEvent
     
    EurekaServerAutoConfiguration
     
    EurekaServerAutoConfiguration.EurekaServerConfigBeanConfiguration
     
    EurekaServerBootstrap
     
    EurekaServerConfigBean
     
    EurekaServerInitializerConfiguration
     
    EurekaServerJerseyClientAutoConfiguration
     
    EurekaServerMarkerConfiguration
    Responsible for adding in a marker bean to activate EurekaServerAutoConfiguration.
    EurekaServerStartedEvent
     
    EurekaServiceInstance
    An Eureka-specific ServiceInstance implementation.
    EurekaServiceRegistry
     
    EurekaTlsProperties
    Eureka client TLS properties.
    HostnameBasedUrlRandomizer
     
    InstanceInfoFactory
    See com.netflix.appinfo.providers.EurekaConfigBasedInstanceInfoProvider.
    InstanceRegistry
     
    InstanceRegistryProperties
     
    LoadBalancerEurekaAutoConfiguration
    An Autoconfiguration that loads default config for Spring Cloud LoadBalancer clients.
    ManagementMetadata
    Stores management metadata for Eureka.
    ManagementMetadataProvider
    Provider for Eureka-specific management metadata.
    ReplicationClientAdditionalFilters
     
    RestClientDiscoveryClientOptionalArgs
    RestClient implementation of DiscoveryClientOptionalArgs that supports supplying ClientRequestFilter.
    RestClientEurekaHttpClient
    RestClient implementation of EurekaHttpClient.
    RestClientTransportClientFactories
     
    RestClientTransportClientFactory
    Provides the custom RestClient required by the RestClientEurekaHttpClient.
    TimeoutProperties
    Properties for configuring timeouts used in RestClient required by EurekaHttpClient.
    WebClientDiscoveryClientOptionalArgs
     
    WebClientEurekaHttpClient
     
    WebClientTransportClientFactories
     
    WebClientTransportClientFactory
    Provides the custom WebClient.Builder required by the WebClientEurekaHttpClient.
    ZoneUtils
    Utility class for dealing with zones.
